command: execute as @r at @s run summon minecraft:tnt ~ ~2 ~ {Fuse:40}
execute as @a at @s run summon minecraft:lightning_bolt ~ ~2 ~
execute as @a at @s run summon minecraft:creeper ~ ~ ~

execute as @a at @s run summon minecraft:zombie ^ ^ ^-2 {Tags:["nivroy_equipped_spawn"]}
execute as @a at @s run item replace entity @e[type=minecraft:zombie,tag=nivroy_equipped_spawn,sort=nearest,limit=1,distance=..8] armor.head with minecraft:diamond_helmet
execute as @a at @s run item replace entity @e[type=minecraft:zombie,tag=nivroy_equipped_spawn,sort=nearest,limit=1,distance=..8] armor.chest with minecraft:diamond_chestplate
execute as @a at @s run item replace entity @e[type=minecraft:zombie,tag=nivroy_equipped_spawn,sort=nearest,limit=1,distance=..8] armor.legs with minecraft:iron_leggings
execute as @a at @s run item replace entity @e[type=minecraft:zombie,tag=nivroy_equipped_spawn,sort=nearest,limit=1,distance=..8] armor.feet with minecraft:golden_boots
execute as @a at @s run item replace entity @e[type=minecraft:zombie,tag=nivroy_equipped_spawn,sort=nearest,limit=1,distance=..8] weapon.mainhand with minecraft:iron_sword
execute as @a at @s run tag @e[type=minecraft:zombie,tag=nivroy_equipped_spawn,sort=nearest,limit=1,distance=..8] remove nivroy_equipped_spawn
